productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Porsche Design Black Casual Shoes
description: For those who love motorsporting, the Porsche Design S3 from adidas originals is fabulous take on its predecessor. With a sleek silhouette and clean design, it's a great shoe for those who love those long drives and stylish clothing.UpperSynthetic leather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfootLacing system for a snug, customised FitLightly padded collar and tongue for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole textured on the forefoot for absolute durability and gripShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
